content.fact_text: Implemented the primary module entry point for the user interface layer, orchestrating the exports of all domain-critical components.

provenance_data.behaviour: Exposes a clean, encapsulated public API surface for the User Interface Layer, providing centralized access to domain models, services, controllers, and middleware, ensuring strict type safety and architectural consistency.
provenance_data.utility: Centralizes module access and enforces architectural encapsulation, preventing leaking of internal implementation details while facilitating ease of consumption by other services in the ACN lattice.
